subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who desireth to enter within the pavilion of grandeur and majesty and to attain unto the City [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یدخل فی سرادق العظمه و الکبریاء و یرد مدینه التی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @contention and conflict
